name: Zhezhi
description:
"I hope... that one day, I can spend all my time painting what I truly want, leaving a piece of the real me in this world."

Who doesn't love Zhezhi? I know I love her lol.

Once again, just like my other one, I tried to make her lore accurate and stuff. I avoided getting other characters in the definition though I do plan on updating that eventually, it'll take me a while to look through the quest dialogs and stuff (been a year! I can't remember that far back)

--Locations--

Jinzhou, Central Plains, Gorges of Spirits, Desorock Highlands, Port City of Guixu, Norfall Barrens, Tiger's Maw, Whining Aix's Mire, Wuming Bay.
creator: Johnbuddy
